action.reasoning: Observation: Training with virtual node (6 layers, emb_dim=600) reached val AP=0.2396 at epoch 30, still improving strongly. Previous best eval score was 0.1868 (without virtual node). Analysis: The model is clearly still improving - loss going from 0.0432 to 0.0351 over 30 epochs. Each epoch takes ~65s. With 4.47h remaining and 18 iterations, I should: 1) Submit eval with current checkpoint to get updated score, 2) Continue training for more epochs. The model needs more training - it's still improving. Decision: Submit eval with current best checkpoint, then continue training for 30 more epochs.
